name: Editor tabs allow switching between open files
description: When multiple files are open, the user can switch between them by clicking the editor tabs at the top of the editor area.

planSteps.description: Open the file style.css from the file explorer sidebar
Open the file app.js from the file explorer sidebar
Verify at least two editor tabs are visible at the top of the editor area
Click on the tab for index.html (or the first tab)
Verify the editor content switches to show HTML code
Click on the tab for style.css
Verify the editor content switches to show CSS code
